title: [codereview] coap: missing lichen_coap_deaddrop_register API in header and impl
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/include/lichen/coap_server.h and coap_deaddrop.c (missing): The Kconfig help for LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP references lichen_coap_deaddrop_register() but no such function or file exists. This makes the new config incomplete. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-b6cs huho. P1 correctness. Must add stub or full impl to close.
